markets.question: Spread: Fortaleza CEIF (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Colombia Primera A game, scheduled for April 3 at 7:20 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Fortaleza CEIF" if Fortaleza CEIF win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "CD La Equidad Seguros".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on dimayor.com.co. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.description:
In the upcoming Colombia Primera A game between Fortaleza CEIF and CD La Equidad Seguros, scheduled for April 3 at 7:20 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Fortaleza CEIF and CD La Equidad Seguros combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

markets.question: Ethereum ETF Flows on March 11?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Positive" if total Ethereum ETF flows on Wednesday, March 11, 2026 are greater than 0, and to "Negative" if they are less than 0.

If flows are exactly 0, the market will resolve to 50-50.

The resolution source is Farside Investors, specifically the ETF Flow tab available at https://farside.co.uk/eth/ in the "Total" column for the date specified in the title.

The total flows will be considered finalized for that day once flows for all ETF providers have been published. If data for any ETF provider remains unpublished by 12 PM ET, 2 days after the date specified in the title, the market will resolve based on all available data published up to that time.

If the resolution source becomes permanently unavailable or fails to publish any data by 12 PM ET, 2 days after the specified date, the market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: Fortaleza CEIF vs. CD La Equidad Seguros: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Colombia Primera A game between Fortaleza CEIF and CD La Equidad Seguros, scheduled for April 3 at 7:20 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Fortaleza CEIF and CD La Equidad Seguros each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on dimayor.com.co. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.
